problem_solved: Difficulty finding eligible patients for clinical trials and designing optimal trial protocols
solution_description: Global clinical trial network connecting healthcare organizations with pharma for patient recruitment and trial design. Real-time EHR data from 200M+ patients across 150+ healthcare orgs.
notes: Leading clinical trial patient finding network. Competes with IQVIA, Datavant. EHR network effects create moat. Critical for trial feasibility and recruitment.
